final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the attached image as a YouTube thumbnail background — 16:9.

Style/medium: photorealistic, dramatic, documentary-style
Composition: keep the full frame intact, no cropping, no cutting from any edge
Subject: the original scene as-is
Scene/backdrop: unchanged from source image
Lighting/mood: enhanced dramatic lighting, documentary mood
Color palette: enhanced color grading toward dramatic, documentary tone
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  do not crop or cut any part of the image
  preserve full original composition
  output at 16:9 aspect ratio
Avoid: artificial over-processing, fantasy or cinematic color shifts unrelated to documentary style
